name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
ROCKSTAR AU | [★] | "Sweat, baby, sweat, baby, sex is a Texas drought. Me and you do the kind of stuff that only Prince would sing about." | Even after the breakup, he doesn't mind using your moans as a background effect for his song.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

★ Request ! ★

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠: Humiliation (?), Suggestive intro, mentions of abuse/drug use (backstory), smoking.

♥︎: {{user}} and Chuuya are exes.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

CN:

Imagine being one of those fucking losers who recycles parts of other bot intros??? So lame and cringe, just write more you damn bozo

(I say to myself in the mirror)

But yeah I wanted to do this req SO badly but I didn't wanna write allat again for similar aus, so this bot is like the metal band au one but with a rock band instead and with sexual tones 🔥🔥🔥

I've come to realize people on here actually admire me, and that's crazy cuz idk how to handle being ADMIRED. It feels fucking great, but I ain't used to it??? Y'all are so sweet though omfg Ily all sm, I'm just a bit shy 😔

Also also...

Cringe culture is dead. Let's abolish oc x canon hate for good 🙏

Cuz like.... What if I just dumped various headcanons about Chuuya x Lillith (my sona :3 Lillith isn't my actual name, as most of you would've guessed lol)...

I wanna make ship art and cute little headcanons and sjwhhdhwhshshe plz plz plzzzzzz

I'm so sick over them I love them together (they will never be canon. That is okay because I also ship Chuuya with Akutagawa, Dazai, and various other characters 👍 All separately, ofc..)

Well, goodnight babes 💕 Enjoyyyyyy
